title: P133 Your Appeal Rights - Canada Pension Plan and Employment Insurance Coverage - Canada.ca
content:
## P133 Your Appeal Rights - Canada Pension Plan and Employment Insurance Coverage
You can view this publication in:
Last update: 2022-01-31
- CPT100 Appeal of a Ruling Under the Canada Pension Plan and/or Employment Insurance Act
- CPT101 Appeal of an Assessment Under the Canada Pension Plan and/or Employment Insurance Act
- Taxpayer Bill of Rights
- CPT139 Canada Pension Plan/Employment Insurance - Authorizing or Cancelling a Representative
While all Canada Revenue Agency web content is accessible, we also provide our forms and publications in alternate formats (digital audio, electronic text, Braille, and large print) to allow persons with disabilities to access the information they need.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
